steps.t: Bâr Aroth can be found on a hillside to the north of the Cross-roads in North Ithilien. Thurindol has asked you to assess the Enemy's presence in Nort…
Thurindol can be found at Aelin Veren. You have scouted the lands surrounding Bâr Aroth and should bring news to Thurindol at Aelin Veren.
